footer.tagline: Quality web development for your business

cta.heading: Ready to build something great?
cta.subheading: Let's turn your idea into a fast, modern web product.

hero.subheadline: Frontend, Backend and Full-Stack development — fast, clean, and built to scale.

services.heading: Services built for growth
services.subheading: End-to-end development from idea to launch — everything your business needs to succeed online.

web.title: Web Development
web.description: Fast, scalable web apps built with Next.js and React. From landing pages to complex platforms — pixel-perfect and production-ready.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce
ecommerce.description: Custom online stores that convert. Integrated payments, smart inventory, and seamless checkout flows tailored to your brand.

backend.title: Backend & APIs
backend.description: Robust REST and GraphQL APIs, database architecture, and server infrastructure designed to handle real-world scale.

design.title: UI/UX Design
design.description: Clean, modern interfaces crafted in Figma. Responsive, accessible, and designed to guide users from first click to conversion.

performance.title: SEO & Performance
performance.description: Core Web Vitals optimisation, technical SEO audits, and speed improvements that move rankings and keep users engaged.

support.title: Maintenance & Support
support.description: Ongoing updates, proactive monitoring, and priority support so your product stays fast, secure, and up to date.

process.heading: From idea to launch in 4 steps
process.subheading: A clear, collaborative process that keeps you informed and in control at every stage.
process.step1Desc: We map out your goals, audience, and requirements in a focused kickoff session. No fluff — just clarity.
process.step2Desc: Wireframes and high-fidelity mockups. You approve every detail before a single line of code is written.
process.step3Desc: Clean, tested, production-ready code delivered in transparent sprints with regular check-ins and demos.
process.step4Desc: Deployment, performance monitoring, and post-launch support to make sure everything runs flawlessly.

testimonials.heading: Trusted by businesses across Europe
testimonials.subheading: Real results from real collaborations — no filler, no stock quotes.
testimonials.1quote: Adrian delivered our platform two weeks ahead of schedule. The code quality and attention to detail genuinely exceeded our expectations.
testimonials.2quote: Working with Adrian felt like having a senior developer in-house. Responsive, proactive, and highly skilled — exactly what we needed.
testimonials.3quote: Our conversion rate jumped 40% after the redesign. The performance improvements alone paid for the entire project within the first month.

about.heading: Senior developer, based in Romania
about.body1: I'm Adrian — a full-stack developer with 5+ years building web products for startups and established businesses across Europe. I specialise in the modern JavaScript ecosystem: Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Node.js.
about.body2: I care deeply about performance, clean code, and delivering real business value. Every project gets the same precision and dedication, whether it's a landing page or a complex SaaS platform.
